headline: Vicki on the bounce as Sofia’s lot take a kicking
text: Vicki had a lovely little afternoon: USA beat Bosnia & Herzegovina, and Belgium nicked a draw, so that’s a tidy boost. Alex also gets a grin after England saw off DR Congo. Chris, though, is left nursing a bruise after Bosnia & Herzegovina lost. Sofia’s Senegal were dragged into a draw, so no great scandal, but no joy either. Overall, Max is still top of the shop on 26 points, while Sofia remains bottom and looking for a bit of a miracle. Proper sweepstake mayhem, that.
